chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. D – 173 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case For hearing of MA No.1209/2022 (Return of Surety) 20-07-2022 Mr. Ayaz Ahmed Bhayo, Advocate for the applicant / surety. M/s Mujeeb-ur-Rehman Soomro and Bahawal-ud-Din Shaikh, Special Prosecutors NAB..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- This is an application for return of surety. It appears that petitioner No.1 Muhammad Hashim had filed this Constitutional Petition along with others for pre-arrest bail and he was granted interim pre-arrest bail by this Court vide order dated 19-11-2019, in the sum of Rs.3,00,000/- (Rupees five lac) and P.R. Bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Additional Registrar of this Court. Thereafter, on 20-10-2021, interim pre- arrest bail granted to the petitioner was converted into protective bail for a period of ten days against the surety already furnished by him, enabling him to appear before the Accountability Court, Sukkur in the view of recent amendments in the Accountability Laws. Thereafter, petitioner surrendered before the trial Court and he has been granted interim pre- arrest bail vide order dated 25-10-2021. Copies of the orders are annexed along with the application for return of surety. As per the endorsement of Accountant of this Court, applicant Mohbat Khan Rind furnished surety by submitting original Solvency Certificate No.14 dated 20-11-2019 issued by Mukhtiarkar (Revenue), Taluka Kotdiji and it was accepted. Special Prosecutor NAB has recorded his no objection for return of the surety document. In the view of above, application for return of surety is allowed.

Special Prosecutor NAB has recorded his no objection for return of the surety document. In the view of above, application for return of surety is allowed. Office is directed to return the original Solvency Certificate to the applicant after proper identification and verification as per rules. Let the copy of this order be sent to the Mukhtiarkar concerned. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
